description: You are a Clinical Research Coordinator. Your task is to extract data from an EMR text export at /home/ga/data/emr_export_jsmith.txt and transcribe it into OpenClinica (username: root / password: Admin123!) for the 'Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry' study. Enroll patient 'CV-106' using the Date of Birth and Sex found in the EMR. Schedule a 'Baseline Encounter' study event using the Encounter Date from the EMR. Upload the CRF template from /home/ga/data/vitals_template.xls and assign it to the 'Baseline Encounter' event definition. Transcribe the Heart Rate, Systolic Blood Pressure, and Diastolic Blood Pressure into the CRF. Convert the Height (inches) and Weight (lbs) from the EMR to metric units (cm and kg, rounded to 1 decimal place) and record them as a Discrepancy Note (type: Annotation) on the Heart Rate field using the exact format: 'Height: [X] cm, Weight: [Y] kg'. Mark the CRF as complete.
